---
title: "AI Alignment as a Game"
short-title: "AI Alignment"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Principal-agent framings, CIRL, corrigibility, and alignment through game-theoretic lenses."
keywords: ["AI alignment", "principal-agent", "CIRL", "corrigibility", "game theory"]
---

# AI Alignment as a Game {#sec-ai-alignment}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
